creator: freebsdports@chillibear.com
text:
Rejected.

Since the latest version has moved on a couple more point releases in the
intervening time.  I've done a fresh patch to update to the latest version.
Please see: ports/150521

Regards

Eric

> From: Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org>
> Reply-To: <bug-followup@FreeBSD.org>
> Date: Thu, 9 Sep 2010 06:30:27 UT
> To: <freebsdports@chillibear.com>
> Cc: <bug-followup@FreeBSD.org>
> Subject: Re: ports/150414: [PATCH] net/rubygem-whois: update to 1.3.1
> 
> Maintainer of net/rubygem-whois,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/150414 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/150414
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
